---
title: "About Me"
format:
  html:
    raw-html: true
---

## Background

I am Gnanesh Reddy, a postgraduate student pursuing an **MSc in Business Analytics** at Dublin City University, Ireland. My academic journey began with a strong foundation in business and quantitative methods, and has since evolved into a focused specialisation in data-driven decision making.

Before joining DCU, I developed an interest in how organisations use data to gain competitive advantage — particularly in financial markets and retail operations. That curiosity is what drives my work today.

## Skills

| Category | Tools & Technologies |
|---|---|
| Programming | Python (pandas, NumPy, Plotly, scikit-learn) |
| Data & Databases | SQL, Excel, Google Sheets |
| Visualisation | Plotly, Matplotlib, Power BI |
| Version Control | Git, GitHub |
| Web & Publishing | Quarto, HTML, CSS, SCSS |
| Analytics | Forecasting, EDA, Statistical Modelling |

## Proficiency

```{=html}
<div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">
  <strong>Python &amp; pandas</strong>
  <div style="background:#e9ecef;border-radius:8px;height:14px;margin-top:6px">
    <div style="background:#2980b9;width:85%;height:14px;border-radius:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">
  <strong>Data Visualisation (Plotly)</strong>
  <div style="background:#e9ecef;border-radius:8px;height:14px;margin-top:6px">
    <div style="background:#2980b9;width:80%;height:14px;border-radius:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">
  <strong>SQL</strong>
  <div style="background:#e9ecef;border-radius:8px;height:14px;margin-top:6px">
    <div style="background:#2980b9;width:75%;height:14px;border-radius:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">
  <strong>Git &amp; Version Control</strong>
  <div style="background:#e9ecef;border-radius:8px;height:14px;margin-top:6px">
    <div style="background:#2980b9;width:78%;height:14px;border-radius:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">
  <strong>Business Intelligence</strong>
  <div style="background:#e9ecef;border-radius:8px;height:14px;margin-top:6px">
    <div style="background:#2980b9;width:82%;height:14px;border-radius:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">
  <strong>Cloud &amp; DevOps</strong>
  <div style="background:#e9ecef;border-radius:8px;height:14px;margin-top:6px">
    <div style="background:#2980b9;width:70%;height:14px;border-radius:8px"></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Education

**MSc Business Analytics**
Dublin City University · 2025–Present

**Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Business Analytics**
Krishna University, India · 2021–2024

## My Journey

```{mermaid}
timeline
    title Academic & Professional Journey
    2021 : Started Bachelor's Degree
         : Built foundation in Business
    2024 : Graduated with Bachelor's Degree
         : Began learning DevOps and Cloud concepts
    2025 : Joined DCU — MSc Business Analytics
         : Building data analytics and Python skills
         : Seeking graduate roles in Ireland
```

## Featured Video

This video covers Python for data analysis — the core toolkit used throughout my projects:

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r-uOLxNrNk8 >}}

## Goals

My immediate goal is to apply my analytical skills in a graduate data analyst or business intelligence role, where I can contribute to decision-making through rigorous data analysis. Longer term, I aim to work in financial analytics or strategy consulting, using data to inform high-stakes business decisions.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Fun Fact
I find financial markets fascinating — not just for the numbers, but for what they reveal about human behaviour and collective decision-making.
:::

## Outside of Work

When I am not working with data, I enjoy following financial markets, reading about macroeconomics, and exploring Dublin.
